title: astragalus tephrodes var. chloridae
intro: Astragalus tephrodes var. chloridae is a plant species, commonly known as a type of legume, in the Fabaceae family. It is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus tephrodes var. chloridae include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Astragalus tephrodes var. chloridae is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, where it is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", astragalus tephrodes var. chloridae has an antimutagenesis effect, particularly in reducing cyclophosphamide-induced micronucleus number and gene mutagenesis.
